hero.subtitle: One subscription. Unlimited massages at the best studios in the capital. From Salamanca to Malasaña, your body deserves more.

step1.title: Subscribe
step1.desc: €79/month. No contracts, no surprises. Cancel anytime.

step2.title: Pick a studio
step2.desc: Book at any partner studio in Madrid from the app.

step3.title: Enjoy without limits
step3.desc: Come back as often as you want. Your body will thank you.

studios.title: The best hands in Madrid, on a single pass.
studios.subtitle: Carefully curated studios in the city's most vibrant neighborhoods.

features.f5: Personal support whenever you need it

faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.a1: You pay €79/month and book unlimited massages at any of our partner studios in Madrid. No per-visit charges.
faq.a2: Yes. No contracts, no minimum. Cancel from the app in one click.
faq.q3: What types of massage are included?
faq.a3: All of them: Swedish, deep tissue, sports, Thai, hot stone, reflexology and more — depending on the studio.
faq.a4: Yes. Unlimited bookings, subject to each studio's availability.

toast.success: Welcome! We'll let you know when spots open.
